args: CODER_BIN="$(command -v coder || true)"; if [ -z "$CODER_BIN" ] && [ -n "${CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR:-}" ] && [ -x "$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/coder" ]; then CODER_BIN="$CODEX_LOCAL_BIN_DIR/coder"; fi; if [ -z "$CODER_BIN" ] && [ -x /usr/local/bin/coder ]; then CODER_BIN=/usr/local/bin/coder; fi; if [ -z "$CODER_BIN" ] && [ -x /opt/homebrew/bin/coder ]; then CODER_BIN=/opt/homebrew/bin/coder; fi; if [ -z "$CODER_BIN" ]; then echo "coder CLI not found; install it and run: coder login <deployment-url>" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec "$CODER_BIN" exp mcp server --allowed-tools coder_get_authenticated_user,coder_get_task_logs,coder_get_task_status,coder_get_template,coder_get_template_version_logs,coder_get_workspace,coder_get_workspace_agent_logs,coder_get_workspace_build_logs,coder_list_tasks,coder_list_templates,coder_list_workspaces,coder_template_version_parameters,coder_workspace_list_apps,coder_workspace_ls,coder_workspace_port_forward,coder_workspace_read_file,fetch,search
